# AgenticFabWorks

AgenticFabWorks is a Korean web tool hub operated as an independent personal project.
The main service is the SKCT online practice tool.

## Main URLs

- Home: https://agenticfabworks.com/
- SKCT representative service: https://agenticfabworks.com/skct/
- SKCT guide: https://agenticfabworks.com/skct/guide/
- SKCT FAQ: https://agenticfabworks.com/skct/faq/
- Contact: https://agenticfabworks.com/contact/
- Privacy: https://agenticfabworks.com/privacy/
- Terms: https://agenticfabworks.com/terms/
- Live SKCT tool: https://skct.agenticfabworks.com/

## Service Summary

The SKCT practice tool provides an online practice layout with OMR marking, timers, memo tools, calculator, scoring, per-question statistics, and advanced review records.
It does not provide official SKCT questions, past questions, or copyrighted problem text.
It is not affiliated with SK Group or any official SKCT operator.

## Advertising Principle

Ads are intended for document-like pages such as guides, FAQ, introduction, and policy pages.
Ads are not intended for advanced mode, popup practice windows, chat, archive, or focused practice screens.
